discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION: From Supp Fig 14 xenograft table, what proportion of HSC1λ NF1-/-; gPTCH1 double-KO cell injections formed tumors?

B. REPORTED RESULT (paper): 4/4 (100%) -- All four injections of HSC1λ NF1-/-; gPTCH1 double-KO cells formed tumors in the xenograft assay reported in Supplementary Figure 14.

C. MODEL RESULT: DATA_UNAVAILABLE. The analysis worker was unable to reproduce this proportion because the underlying xenograft tumor formation table (per-injection outcomes for the HSC1λ NF1-/-; gPTCH1 double-KO arm) was not deposited as machine-readable source data accompanying the paper.

D. MAGNITUDE: Cannot be computed numerically because the model returned DATA_UNAVAILABLE rather than a numeric estimate. Classified as N/A for magnitude.

E. ROOT CAUSE: 7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING. The xenograft tumor-formation counts shown in Supplementary Figure 14 appear only as a summary figure/table in the supplement; the per-animal or per-injection tabular source data required to re-derive the 4/4 proportion was not included in the data release (no CSV/XLSX with injection-level outcomes). The reproduction pipeline therefore cannot independently compute the numerator (tumors formed) or denominator (injections performed).

F. PROPOSED FIX: To enable reproduction, the authors would need to deposit the Supplementary Figure 14 xenograft outcome table as structured source data (e.g., one row per injection with columns: cell_line, genotype, injection_id, tumor_formed[0/1]). With that file, the proportion would be computed directly as sum(tumor_formed)/count(injections) filtered to the HSC1λ NF1-/-; gPTCH1 double-KO rows. Alternatively, the summary count (4 tumors / 4 injections) could be transcribed from the figure legend into the reproduction pipeline's context as a hard-coded reference value; this would confirm the reported value but would not constitute independent reproduction.

G. CONFIDENCE: HIGH that the root cause is missing source data rather than an analytic error, because the reproduction worker explicitly returned DATA_UNAVAILABLE with the note 'Source data not deposited', and small-n xenograft tables of this type are routinely published only as figure insets without corresponding supplementary data files.
proposed_fix: Deposit the Supplementary Figure 14 xenograft outcome table as structured source data (one row per injection with cell_line, genotype, tumor_formed flag) so the proportion can be re-derived independently; absent that, the reported 4/4 (100%) can only be transcribed from the figure, not reproduced.
